name: banglafest-ticketing-backend
description: Backend API for Banglafest Ticketing System

scripts.build: tsc && node -e "const{existsSync,mkdirSync,copyFileSync}=require('fs');const p=require('path');const d='dist/assets';if(!existsSync(d))mkdirSync(d,{recursive:true});const s=p.join('src','assets','logo.png');if(existsSync(s)){copyFileSync(s,p.join(d,'logo.png'));console.log('Logo copied to dist/assets/logo.png');}else{console.warn('Logo not found at src/assets/logo.png');}const a=p.join('public','ambrosian wide.png');if(existsSync(a)){copyFileSync(a,p.join(d,'ambrosian wide.png'));console.log('Ambrosian logo copied to dist/assets/ambrosian wide.png');}else{console.warn('Ambrosian logo not found at public/ambrosian wide.png');}"
